## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content strategy and execution services to Ceros leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy, creation, and optimization using AI + human experts](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Ceros needs to rebuild marketing, particularly content strategy, to drive organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Potential collaboration between GrowthX and Ceros to develop comprehensive content engine](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [GrowthX's 8-week strategy sprint ($20k) could jumpstart partnership and content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, former CMO with track record of organic growth success](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Combines AI-powered platform with expert human editors/strategists](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [75 employees, $1M ARR in under 1 year](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Clients include major brands like Udemy, Webflow, Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

### GrowthX Process

  - [8-week strategy sprint to develop content strategy, workflows, artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [AI-assisted research and content creation with human expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Tracks organic search performance and AI answer visibility](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Can handle full execution or augment existing marketing teams](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)

### Ceros Situation

  - [Rebuilding marketing team, seeking content lead (open to fractional)](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [New CRO driving go-to-market changes](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Recently launched podcast hosted by CEO Alison](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [Content team experiencing churn (e.g. Corey Wallace departing)](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Develop comprehensive content strategy aligned to Ceros ICPs/verticals](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Create high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Explore branded separate domain for thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=2281.0)
  - [Leverage GrowthX platform to amplify existing content (e.g. podcast)](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)

### Content Distribution

  - [Hani inquired about third-party distribution capabilities (like Stacker)](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=2454.0)
  - [Tyler to research and address in follow-up deep dive meeting](https://fathom.video/share/yYymii8gFXS7PxY6QSyhsnbLkSaj2opx?tab=summary&timestamp=2515.0)
